title: Medieval
description: Core Mod for the Medieval MC Modpacks
body:
This is a core mod for the Medieval MC modpacks by Lunapixel Studios. 

While you are allowed to use it in your own Modrinth modpacks as you see fit, it may be a bit of a headache - It will always be developed for the mod versions we use in our modpacks, and may rely on exclusive content. 

Currently (depending on version) this mod applies a few bugfixes and performance patches for unmaintained mods, integrates a few other mods together, and adds a small amount of custom content, such as a town portal scroll item, or an orb that respawns structures. 

Mod integration might not always be made optional, so crashes may happen if you try to use it without the mods it changes.
